title: dryopteris filix-mas var. abbreviata
intro: Dryopteris filix-mas var. abbreviata, also known as the 'Short-crested Male Fern', is a variety of the Male Fern plant, characterized by its smaller fronds and shorter stalks compared to the typical Male Fern. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Dryopteris filix-mas var. abbreviata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
